title: neocouma ternstroemiacea
intro: Neocouma ternstroemiacea, also known as the Neocouma plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical regions of Central and South America and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Neocouma ternstroemiacea include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
